tasks.prompt:
深度扫描服务器所有日志，每10分钟一次，持续到今晚12点。

执行以下命令并记录结果到 /tmp/server-log-scan/ 目录：

```bash
LOG_DIR="/tmp/server-log-scan"
mkdir -p $LOG_DIR
TS=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M')
REPORT="$LOG_DIR/scan-$TS.txt"

{
  echo "========== 服务器日志扫描 $(date) =========="
  echo ""
  echo "【容器健康】"
  docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}} ({{.Status}})' | grep -v Exited
  echo ""
  echo "【关键容器错误（最近10分钟）】"
  for c in shenxiang-nextjs docker-worker-1 docker-worker_beat-1 docker-api-1 docker-plugin_daemon-1 docker-web-1 docker-sandbox-1 docker-db_postgres-1 docker-redis-1 docker-weaviate-1 docker-nginx-1; do
    errs=$(docker logs $c --since '10m' 2>&1 | grep -ciE '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}.*ERROR|^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}.*FATAL|unavailable|refused|timeout')
    if [ "$errs" -gt 0 ]; then
      echo "⚠️ $c: $errs errors"
      docker logs $c --since '10m' 2>&1 | grep -iE 'ERROR|FATAL|exception|unavailable|refused|timeout' | tail -3
    fi
  done
  echo ""
  echo "【shenxiang-nextjs 状态】"
  docker inspect shenxiang-nextjs --format '{{.State.Health.Status}} ({{.State.Status}})' 2>/dev/null || echo "容器不存在"
  echo ""
  echo "【资源使用】"
  docker stats --no-stream --format '{{.Name}}: CPU={{.CPUPerc}} MEM={{.MemUsage}}' | grep -E 'shenxiang-nextjs|docker-worker|docker-api' | head -5
  echo ""
  echo "【磁盘】"
  df -h / | tail -1
} > $REPORT 2>&1

# 如果有错误，输出警告
if grep -q "⚠️" $REPORT; then
  echo "⚠️ [$(date)] 发现错误！详见 $REPORT"
  grep "⚠️" $REPORT
else
  echo "✅ [$(date)] 扫描完成，无错误"
fi
```

将输出保存到 $REPORT。如果发现任何 ERROR/FATAL/异常，立即通知用户。
